description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a single job named build_image using the docker:git Docker image and the docker:dind service. The job should only run on the master branch. In the script, execute `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com`, then `docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/bennyp/polymer-test .`, and finally `docker push registry.gitlab.com/bennyp/polymer-test:latest`. No explicit stages are declared, so the job runs in the default stage.
